title: Also grey out completed agents more obviously

log.context: Also grey out completed agents more obviously

Done. Both changes are live at `/mnt/data/terminal/server.py`:

**Two-column grid** — `#agents-list` now uses `display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr` so cards render in two columns side by side.

**Completed card styling** — `.sa-card.done` now has:
- `opacity: 0.4` (down from 0.65)
- `filter: grayscale(70%)` (drains the color out)
- `background: #080c10` (darker background)
- `border-color: #151f2a` (muted border)
- Hover eases back to `opacity: 0.75` + `grayscale(30%)` so you can still...(truncated)
